name: treasury_bank_feed_categorize
description: Treasury bank-feed categorize — Phase-2a target. TODAY this bypasses the event engine via direct accountingPostJe() in modules/treasury/api/account_transactions.php. This scenario is designed to FAIL the no_direct_gl invariant on the legacy path and PASS once 2a refactors treasury to emit treasury.bank_transaction.matched through accountingProcessEvent.
